name: Orange Almond Honey Muffins-NHB
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda and salt; set aside.
2. Using an electric mixer, beat butter and honey until light.
3. Beat in egg, orange juice concentrate and orange peel.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture, mixing until just blended.
5. Stir in almonds.
6. Spoon batter into 8 greased or paper-lined 2-1/2-inch muffin cups.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Remove muffins from pan and let cool on a wire rack.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature.
